title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, a company valued at $7 billion, by focusing on a specific problem: enterprise information retrieval and discoverability. His strategic principle is to identify underserved problems and avoid building in spaces where others already dominate, prioritizing focus over model scale.
